hu101.notes: Common Ford profile. Vehicle/year compatibility must be approved in the vehicle master before export.

fo21.notes: Legacy Ford Tibbe family. Cut count and vehicle compatibility must be stored at vehicle-record level.

hu66.notes: Used only on Ford-badged shared Volkswagen platforms where independently approved.

sip22.notes: Used only on Ford-badged Fiat-derived platforms where independently approved.

hu162t.notes: Current VAG-family profile. Exact variant such as T9/T10 must be held in the vehicle mapping.

emergency_blade_unknown.notes: Use instead of guessing a blade profile for passive-key vehicles.
